div1.entryFree: Brave, subst., display of valour, defiance, threatening: I will not bear these --s of thine, Shr. III, 1, 15. there end thy b. and turn thy face in peace, John V, 2, 159. where's the Bastard's --s, and Charles his gleeks? H6A III, 2, 123. this b. shall oft make thee to hide thy head, Troil. IV, 4, 139. to bear me down with --s, Tit. II, 1, 30.
